CREATE TABLE date_test (start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
SELECT datesub('month', start_date, end_date) FROM date_test;
CREATE TABLE date_ranges (start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
SELECT dr.start_date, dr.end_date, datesub('month', dr.start_date, dr.end_date) as month_diff FROM date_ranges dr;
WITH date_diff AS (SELECT start_date, end_date, datesub('month', start_date, end_date) AS month_difference FROM date_test) SELECT month_difference FROM date_diff WHERE month_difference > 1;
CREATE TABLE date_combined (id INT, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO date_combined VALUES (1, DATE '2021-01-01', DATE '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO date_combined VALUES (2, DATE '2020-02-15', DATE '2021-02-15');
SELECT dbc.id, datesub('year', dbc.start_date, dbc.end_date) AS year_diff FROM date_combined dbc WHERE year_diff > 2;
SELECT datesub('day', DATE '2023-03-01', DATE '2023-03-10') AS days_diff, datesub('week', DATE '2023-01-01', DATE '2023-02-01') AS weeks_diff;
SELECT dt1.start_date, dt1.end_date, datesub('month', dt1.start_date, dt1.end_date) AS month_diff FROM date_test dt1 JOIN date_test dt2 ON dt1.start_date < dt2.end_date;
